description:
The Legend of Zelda: Oracles of Ages is one of the rare Capcom entries to the series.
Nayru, the oracle of ages, has been possessed by Veran, and she is now making a mess in Labrynna
Gather the Essences of Times, exorcice Nayru and defeat Veran to save the timeline of Labrynna
game: The Legend of Zelda - Oracle of Ages

ooa_2.description:
### ⚠️ Disclaimer

This is an early build, not completely stable, and there is still a risk of softlock at the moment (as I was alone to test it until now). 
I recommand you to NOT use it in large game right now.

Check the [documentation](https://github.com/SenPierre/ArchipelagoOoA/tree/oos/worlds/tloz_ooa/docs) for more details

### 🎉 New features

- Keysanity !
- Dungeon shuffle !
- King zora logic changed ! You know will get a specific blue potion that is specifically used to save king zora now. This allow you to not worry about using your potion before reacing King Zora. 
- An option has been added to reduce the time playing harp and flute.
- Mermaid suit doesn't need you to spam the arrow to move, 
- The sign in front of the Maku tree now display how many essence are required to get the Maku seed, and how many slate are needed to go in D8 lowest floor.

### 🧹 Notable changes : 

- Changed 2 of the three vanilla item in GBA shop to be rupees instead of ring or gasha seed. This add more rupees in the pool
- The guard in Deku forest is now red, in order to easily spot him.
- Jabu Jabu's Belly now reset its water level when you reenter the dungeon to avoid softlock.
- As a side effect of the new potion item, Syrup now have her three spots randomized.
- Shop price have been reduced, as there is less money in circulation in labrynna than in holodrum (as they are victim of inflation)
- You can reenable tokkey dance and the kid joke via an option
- The dumbbell guy now talk less about their political orientations.

### 🛠️ Fixed bugs

- Fairies in the forest shouldn't bother you anymore
- Bomb max now properly set to 10
- Essences should be tracked
- Some locations now show their proper item : 
  - The Hidden Tokay
  - The Wild Tokay Minigame
- The warp option should now show the proper inputs
- The warp to start should be easier to execute
- The fade to white to the inventory should stop creating weird graphical artifacts
- Deku Forest soldier logic should be less restrictive
- D6 Present Compass should stop showing a map sprite
- The Management fixed their sign on Crescent Island.
- Vasu won't be able to create a telepathic link to you each time you get a ring.
- Fixed the GBA option description
- Fixed lynna tree to have the proper default seed.

### 🪲 Notable known bugs :

- Some locations doesn't show their item properly (and show instead the vanilla item). This include :
    - Cheval Invention
    - Cheval Test
    - Past Library
    - Present Library
    - Patch Tuni Nut Ceremony
    - Patch Broken Sword Ceremony
- Progressive Shield doesn't work properly if you lose your shield to a like-like
- Trees aren't properly tracked
- Cheating in an essence break the second screen of the inventory (Please don't)
- Gasha trees are turbo broken
- send_location command doesn't seems to work properly with the trees
- Some key door are only locked in one side, which create situation when you enter a screen and you are softlock if don't have the key.
- Can't call animal in fixed symmetry

### Fixed between 0.2.0 and 0.2.1

- Fixed Satchel Upgrade Text
- Fixed Shooter corrupting the harp ~~(side effect : Now seed shooter refill your seeds)~~
- Fixed issue with D6 Boss key.
- Fixed Syrup slot 1 that you could buy again and again
- Fixed import issue.

### Fixed between 0.2.1 and 0.2.2

- Fixed the seed shooter so it doesn't upgrade your satchel (and removed that side effect from previous update)
- Fixed the default seed AGAIN.

### Fixed between 0.2.2 and 0.2.3

- Fixed D6 object being swapped between present and past in non-keysanity
- Fix Zora Reward Logic
- Fix West Past Crescent Island Logic
- Temporary remove the possibility that D4 entrance contain Maku Path (as it create a softlock if you do it in reverse)
- Maku Tree gift should now drop properly.
- Fix Maku Seed being given before the Maku Tree Gift if you have all the essence and save Nayru. (which made the Maku Tree Gift unobtainable)
- Fix Gale Seed crashing the game if you use them without visiting any tree of the period you're in.
- Fix Time travel making you drown to death if you don't have flippers.

### Fixed between 0.2.3 and 0.2.4

- Fixed a generation issue if you had key sanity active for all items, except boss keys.
ooa_2.title: Oracle of Ages 0.2.4

ooa_3.description:
### ⚠️ Disclaimer

This is an early build, not completely stable, and there is still a risk (albeit a really low one) of softlock at the moment. 
Always ask the organizer before using this game in a large session.

Check the [documentation](https://github.com/SenPierre/ArchipelagoOoA/tree/oos/worlds/tloz_ooa/docs) for more details

### 🎉 New features

* Death link is now supported

### 🧹 Notable changes : 

* Update to Archipelago 5.1
* The version of the world and the player linked to the rom is shown in the file selection screen
* Lynna shooting range now have a proper check
* D4, D5, D6 (past & present) and D7 now open automatically their door when you exit them from the maku path with a dungeon shuffle
* The Mermaid suit QOL is now an option

### 🛠️ Fixed bugs

* Fixed some key logic in D6
* Trees are now properly tracked
* Shooting gallery now work properly with Biggoron Sword
* Archipelago Progressive items should now have a fixed red hue.
* Fixed logic around crescent island
* Fixed D2 Logic (Thx to f-Razor)
* Fixed Ricky's glove logic (Thx to f-raZ0R)
 
### 🪲 Notable known bugs :

- Some locations doesn't show their item properly (and show instead the vanilla item). This include :
    - Cheval Invention
    - Cheval Test
    - Past Library
    - Present Library
    - Patch Tuni Nut Ceremony
    - Patch Broken Sword Ceremony
- Progressive Shield doesn't work properly if you lose your shield to a like-like
- Cheating in an essence break the second screen of the inventory (Please don't)
- Gasha trees are turbo broken
- send_location command doesn't seems to work properly with the trees
- Some key door are only locked in one side, which create situation when you enter a screen and you are softlock if don't have the key.
- Can't call animal in fixed symmetry (Might be vanilla ??)

### ❓Could not reproduce the following bugs : 

- If the first item is Biggoron Sword, the following item will be lost.

### Fixed between 0.3.0 and 0.3.1

- Reverted the fix on the soldier asking for mystery seed, as it generated a softlock.

### Fixed between 0.3.1 and 0.3.2

- Fixed the flag of the deku soldier
ooa_3.title: Oracle of Ages 0.3.2

ooa_4_2.description:
- Fixed a security issue with rom generation.
- Tweaked D5 logic
- Map now show the correct tree at each location
ooa_4_2.title: Oracle of Ages 0.4.3 - Quick Fixes

ooa_4_3.description: * Fixed a generation issue for archipelago 0.6.2+ (Thanks Ishigh)
ooa_4_3.title: Oracle of Ages 0.4.3.bis

ooa_4r3.description:
### ⚠️ Disclaimer

This is an early build, not perfectly stable. Always ask the organizer before using this game in a large session.

Check the [documentation](https://github.com/SenPierre/ArchipelagoOoA/tree/oos/worlds/tloz_ooa/docs) for more details

### 🎉 New features

* Master keys ! (aka Key rings)
* Compasses are now properly implemented with the chime coming from Stawmat randomizer !
* The tokays welcome you in their market ! 2 additionnal check available here.
* Ganon goal is now implemented ! (Thanks to Ishigh !)
* Impa now refill your health, seeds and bombs !
* More ring option (Thanks to OmegaZeron !)
* Sprite customization !

### 🧹 Notable changes : 

* Some option have been moved to the host.yaml settings file, check it out !
* Combat difficulty option has been added
* Heart beep settings has been added
* Rings are now affecting medium logic instead of hard.

### 🛠️ Fixed bugs

* Fixed visual of the cheval grave and library past and present's checks
* Fixed keydrop not displaying text for key in keysanity
* Fixed the shop not activating the flute when you buy it
* Shield now properly upgrade if you lost your shield to a likelike and get a new one via a check.
* Gasha trees are not turbo broken anymore

### 🪲 Notable known bugs :

- Cheating in an essence break the second screen of the inventory (Please don't)
- Some key door are only locked in one side, which create situation when you enter a screen and you are softlock if don't have the key.
- Trade items aren't displayed properly in the second screen

### ❓Could not reproduce the following bugs : 

- Nayru sprite is broken during a cinematic in ambi palace.


### Changed made in 0.4.1

- Fixed a crash in the tokay market if the left item was a archipelago progression item.
- Added topology in the spoiler

### Changed made in 0.4.2

- Fixed Sad Boi not given you its item when skipping the joke.
- Tokay market now accept that you only have the seed shooter.
- Added recompatibility feature 

Latest version is retro-compatible with world generated up to the 0.4.0 version.
ooa_4r3.title: Oracle of Ages 0.4.2

v0.5.0.description:
This release is aimed to mostly fix issues relating to text problems and etc. 

## What's New
* Added Hero's Cave to the list of dungeons for dungeon shuffle (if hero's cave is enabled)
* Added warp_to_start location option to give users an option of where their warping location needs to be. By default, the warping location will be set to the screen with the triforce stone in it.
* Added a new setting option called skip_starting_cinematic where if turned on, you don't see the nintendo logo and the cinematic at all, just the start screen.
* Added Music/SFX Shuffle options in settings where if turned on, will shuffle your music/SFX each time you patch a new game.
* Added Mute Music setting option that allows you to mute in game music if you need to do things like adding your own music into your video or etc.
## What's Fixed
* Tokay Chicken Hut no longer refills your bombs and it's item sprite has finally been changed.
* Most text errors have been eliminated. I am not sure about all of them though, I did my last playthough of this game with keysanity on and I think I remember finding one text error that occured when I got the D3 small key and AP thought that I got a piece of heart. Hopefully that's not me.
* Ridge Bush Cave Chest was fixed after a bug discovery by one of the developers.
## What's Improved
* Dungeon precision text has been improved via a setting option called improve_dungeon_precision_text where instead of the text saying "Dungeon {NUMBER}," it will say "{DUNGEON_NAME}." This will only be a necessity if you have sanity (except slates) of any kind enabled.
* The link summoned cutscene no longer plays when starting a new file (just like in the seasons AP)
* When creating a new file, instead of buttons being brought up like new game, secrets, or link, you are instantly brought to the name creation screen.
* The second screen of the inventory has been improved the same way it was in season world : Most items are removed when used and clear space for others items, and all trade items are now displayed individually.

# NOTE:
The current PopTracker Pack for ages is currently not compatible with this release due to many location changes that will make the pack think that some locations are either obtained when not, or not obtained when obtained, or etc. Right now, it's best if you play with this release if you know the layout/logic of ages pretty well.

UPDATE: As of 4/14/26, the tracker has been updated to support the new location changes that were done with the release. The link is here: https://github.com/Dranzior/ooa_brooty/releases/tag/0.9.3

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/josephanimate2021/ArchipelagoOoA/commits/v0.5.0
v0.5.0.title: Oracle of Ages Apworld v0.5.0

v0.5.1.description:
This is a bugfix release which fixes a problem with the 3rd statue puzzle of Hero's Cave where you get the same item you got from the 2nd statue puzzle. Did not see that initially, but we are good now! Also some logic fixes were added (mainly rolling ridge)

Credit to @SenPierre for contributing to the fixes for the v0.5.1 release!

Full changes :

* Fixed 3rd statue puzzle of Hero's Cave check
* Fix logic for Ganon and Rolling ridge
* Fix warp out of Hero cave in dungeon shuffle
* Fix Maku drop (again)
* Fix Maku Seed appearing like a ghost on top of the inventory (It shouldn't appear at all now)
v0.5.1.title: Oracle of Ages APWorld v0.5.1

v1.0.0.description:
Hoy this is a big release ! We have a ton new stuff for you to try, some QOL and bugs fixes.

We mainly moved to 1.0.0 so we are on par with season for the version logic. From now on, the main version (The first number) will change when retro-compatibility break. Also error message about version should be more explicit now. But also, the game is pretty stable, you have a lot of option, it might be fair to say this is a proper 1.0.

As always, put the apworld in your the custom_world folder, and then you can launch your game simply by double clicking the apooa file and launching it with archipelago. It will just ask for you (legally obtain) ROM of ages if you never set it up.

If you encounter any issue, please report them in the oracle-of-ages channel in the Archipelago Discord.  
https://discord.com/channels/731205301247803413/1492540520462024774

And please... Have a good time. :)
 -- Joseph, Flamestripe & Piapiou

### **New Additions/Options**

- Gasha Locations : option to add up to 15 gasha seed plots, enemy kill requirements modifiable in the yaml.

- Secret locations - added option to enable the post game secret locations, these locations are the ones if you beat ages before seasons.

- 3 New Vasu Rings : the ring you get for beating the game will be available from the start, so talk to vasu twice, and an option for two new rings based on the trophies for killing enemies and collecting rupees, values modifiable in the yaml

- Tokay Thieves : The Tokay who steal your items on crescent now all have items

- Minibosses - added an option to give an item upon defeating a miniboss, placed like the heart container from end bosses.

- Essence Shuffle - new option to shuffle the essences into the item pool

- Linked Heroes Cave - Option to include the linked game hero's cave, the entrance is located at its vanilla location, works with dungeon shuffle

- Duplicate Seed Trees - added option to force up to 3 seed trees to be the duplicate seeds, listed names in yaml.

- Warp to Start Location - changes where the warp to start feature places you, either outside the triforce stone or next to the maku tree time portal

### **Minor Changes**

- Reverted an older change on crescent island that stopped an echoes portal from being activated unless you had tune of currents, will cause softlocks without proper items so be sure to know how to warp to start

- Tune of currents now activates echoes portals, still need to use echoes for the tokkey item

- You are now able to cycle through maps you are currently not on. Press the start button while your map is open.

- While secrets are enabled, a piece of land will appear in the pirate sea area so you can access the underwater chest in the present, this also grants access to the 16th gasha plot in logic. It doesn't grant the ability to randomize 16 rewards, but gives an extra place to plant a seed (16 locations for 15 rewards)

- New games now start in the room with the maku portal and the first item.

- You can now immediately talk with one of the brothers in symmetry city instead of the long chain in vanilla.

- Some rings have been classified as progression items so they can actually show up as logical items, currently these include expert's ring, fist ring, toss ring, and energy ring

- All of the singular check trade quest items are now classified as progression skip balancing. Single game / no progression balancing seeds remain unaffected, but seeds with progression balancing on should no longer have to suffer these items clogging up your progression path. ONLY the items that grant single checks, others that grant 2 or more are unchanged.

### **Bug Fixes**

- More logic fixes, hopefully rolling ridge works properly

- Please rolling ridge work i don't want to look at you anymore

- Can we get rid of rolling ridge so i don't have to look at it again I'm BEGGING

- Second inventory screen items now display properly and are removed when used

- Above change to symmetry city fixes a bug where turning in repaired tuni nut before getting the brother check stopped you from getting it

- Link's (or applicable player sprite's) gloves now have the grippy rubber on it, you should no longer drop your items offscreen when receiving an item from another game on a screen transition

- You are no longer expected to do the goron dance in the past for the brother emblem due to the letter of introduction breaking the first graceful goron's sequences. If you reach him before obtaining the letter then you can still get the item from them, but it will be considered out of logic

- King Zora should hopefully not trap you within his domain expansion while attempting to receive his secret check

- There is no longer an ambush by a large fish in a room it shouldn't be in
v1.0.0.title: Oracle of Ages Apworld v1.0.0

v1.0.1.description: - Fix crashes when entering mini-boss rooms when mini boss location are enabled (whoopsie)
v1.0.1.title: Oracle of Ages Apworld v1.0.1

v1.0.2.description:
(Properly changed the internal apworld version this time. Retro compat should still work)

* Logic fixes
* Fixed Sea of storm chest wrongly swapped if secrets are enabled
* Fixed master keys not being received properly
* Fix the gasha planted flag being reset upon harvest
* Fix a softlock when trying again the elder goron secret baseball minigame
* Fix the bush chest (Again)
v1.0.2.title: Oracle of Ages Apworld v1.0.2
